In this list, journal titles are mostly in standard title case or abbreviated form; this value stands out with unusually lowercase wording and the ampersand pattern differs from the surrounding journal-name conventions.
This journal abbreviation is the only one with missing spaces after periods compared with the other abbreviated titles (e.g. "Proc.Natl.Acad.Sci.U.S.A.", "Curr.Opin.Infect.Dis.").
This abbreviation lacks spaces after periods, unlike the other dotted journal abbreviations in the list.
This title is written as a compact abbreviation, but unlike the other similar abbreviations it has no spaces after periods, making its structure inconsistent with the prevailing pattern.
